name: @nextrap/ntl-consent-blocker
description: Consent-gate layout component for external embeds.

elements.name: ntl-consent-blocker
elements.description: Shows preview/pre-consent content and clones a direct template after consent.

attributes.name: mode
attributes.description: Reflected breakpoint mode, usually managed by the component.

attributes.name: consentgiven
attributes.description: Reflected internal state after the consent action was triggered.

slots.name: background
slots.description: Preview/background layer. Direct .background children and direct p:has(img:not(.keep)) children are assigned automatically.

slots.name: pre-consent
slots.description: Visible consent UI before approval. Use an element with data-action="consent" to trigger loading.

slots.name: consented-content
slots.description: Loaded content after consent. Normally filled from a direct template element.

classes.name: ntl-consent-blocker
classes.description: Base class added automatically by the component.

classes.name: default
classes.description: Semantic default styling hook used by the package default.scss.

classes.name: background
classes.description: Light DOM helper class: direct children with this class are assigned to the background slot.

classes.name: aside
classes.description: Pairing helper class for assigning the component to the ntl-2col aside slot.

classes.name: top
classes.description: Pairing helper class for assigning the component to the ntl-2col top slot.

properties.name: --breakpoint
properties.description: Breakpoint where the internal aspect ratio switches. Default: lg.

properties.name: --aspect-ratio
properties.description: Consent blocker aspect ratio. Default: 16 / 9; mobile default in Shadow DOM is 1 / 1.

properties.name: --default-template
properties.description: HTML string used to create the direct template when no template is provided.

properties.name: --default-bg
properties.description: HTML string used as default background content when no background slot content is provided.

properties.name: --default-pre-consent
properties.description: HTML string used as default pre-consent content when no pre-consent slot content is provided.

properties.name: --border-radius
properties.description: Wrapper border radius set by default-style(). Default: var(--nt-border-radius).

properties.name: --overlay-background
properties.description: Background for the pre-consent part set by default-style().

properties.name: --pre-consent-padding
properties.description: Padding for the pre-consent part set by default-style().
